description: Go for this t-shirt which has been specialy crafted for football lovers, who would want to wear their favourite sport on them! The USP of this t-shirt has to be the graphic image on the front of the tshirt, which is neither too pristine nor too hazy, giving the T-shirt a stylish look.There is never been a more a popular wear than a T-shirt. Everyone prefers    t-shirts over any other form of clothing. A t-shirt offers unbelievable comfort and is extremely easy to put on. They are ideal for wearing at home, office or to parties. Its the consummate casual wear that people cant do without. There are a whole range of t-shirts that come in various shapes, sizes and fits. T-shirts are also available in lots of colours for men. Team up the t-shirt with absolutely anything and it will still look good and feel good. The beauty of t-shirts lies in its simplicity and it continues to win admirers with every passing day. Get into a t-shirt and experience freedom. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in T-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
